DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED ON DEFENDANTS MARCOS BALTAZAR AND MARIA BALTAZAR'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND TO DEEM ADMITTED REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS IS GRANTED IN PART. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND SUBMIT IT TO JUDGE PRO TEM REBECCA WOODSON FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCAS WOODSON, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Discovery Responses And To Deem Admitted Requests For Admissions
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

Ruling - There being no appearances, the Court adopted the tentative ruling with modifications on Defendants Marcos Baltazar and Maria Baltazar's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Discovery Responses And To Deem Admitted Requests For Admissions: Granted in part. The prevailing party is to prepare a form of order and submit it to Judge Pro Tem Rebecca Woodson for review and signature.
